items.title: Qwen 3.8
items.title_zh: 阿里发布 Qwen 3.8：2.4万亿参数开源权重大语言模型
items.title_en: Alibaba Announces Qwen 3.8: 2.4T Parameter Open-Weights LLM
items.summary: Alibaba announces Qwen 3.8, a 2.4T parameter open-weights LLM, responding to Moonshot AI's Kimi K3.

items.title: Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now
items.title_zh: Claude Code 改用基于 Rust 的 Bun 运行时
items.title_en: Claude Code now uses Rust-based Bun runtime
items.summary: Claude Code now uses a Rust-based port of the Bun runtime, offering slight performance improvements and reflecting a major rewrite of a popular JavaScript runtime.

items.title: Follow up: GPT-2's vocabulary as a hyperbolic tree — 32,070 tokens in a Poincaré ball you can fly through [P]
items.title_zh: GPT-2词元嵌入的双曲树交互可视化
items.title_en: Interactive hyperbolic tree for GPT-2 token embeddings
items.summary: Interactive hyperbolic tree visualization of GPT-2's 32,070 token embeddings, demonstrating how hyperbolic space naturally fits the vocabulary's forest-like similarity structure.

items.title: 阿里开源 SAIL 挑战英伟达 CUDA
items.title_zh: 阿里开源SAIL挑战英伟达CUDA主导地位
items.title_en: Alibaba Open Sources SAIL to Challenge NVIDIA CUDA Dominance
items.summary: 阿里巴巴开源SAIL软件栈，旨在降低AI芯片迁移门槛，挑战英伟达CUDA主导地位。

items.title: 美国政客优化网络形象以影响 AI 聊天机器人评价
items.title_zh: 美国政客优化网络形象以影响AI聊天机器人
items.title_en: US Politicians Optimize Online Presence to Influence AI Chatbots
items.summary: US politicians optimize online presence to influence AI chatbot evaluations, spawning a new optimization industry and raising concerns about manipulation.
